query: "gas prices" OR "gasoline prices" OR "oil prices" OR petrol

articles.title: Crude price fears won't derail economy: PM-EAC's Neelkanth Mishra says India can grow over 8% amid West Asia tensions
articles.description: India's economic growth remains resilient despite rising crude oil prices, as per Neelkanth Mishra of the PM-EAC. He highlights India's strong position to manage oil costs and predicts growth over 8% by early 2026.

articles.title: OPEC+ Grapples with Oil Supply as Geopolitical Tensions Loom
articles.description: OPEC+ agrees to increase oil output targets amidst significant geopolitical challenges. Despite increased quotas, ongoing U.S.-Iran tensions hinder production, especially with obstacles like the Strait of Hormuz closure impacting supply. The UAE's departure from OPEC+ adds further complexity to an already strained situation as global oil prices fluctuate.

articles.title: There is no petrol in the country, claims Shivraj Tangadagi
articles.description: Shivraj Tangadagi criticizes BJP's disconnect with citizens amid economic struggles, highlighting fuel shortages and rising commodity prices.

articles.title: Trump Offers Timeline for When Gas Prices Will Start Dropping Again
articles.description: The president's message -- presented at an important roundtable in Wisconsin -- was apparently very well-received.

articles.title: Gas Prices Are Rising Again: 3 Canadian Stocks That Could Benefit
articles.description: Gas prices are surging again, and these three TSX energy stocks offer different ways to benefit if crude stays high.

articles.title: Dalal Street Week Ahead: US-Iran talks, FII trading activity, oil prices among 10 key factors to watch
articles.description: Investors are watching the OPEC+ meeting closely for indications of any output policy response as geopolitical dynamics in West Asia continue to evolve.
